message:
test(engine): add integration tests for cache-oblivious metadata substrate, kernelized shift guard, and semantic dark matter engine

Add comprehensive integration test suites for the three modules
introduced in 44e1e65b: cache_oblivious_metadata_substrate (22 tests,
RGC-626), kernelized_shift_guard (20 tests, RGC-706), and
semantic_dark_matter_engine (23 tests, RGC-707).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
